sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Seh ne lgam sung tui Na phul sak
Israel tung Na piak bang in
Zogam keu ah Nunna tui luang sak aw
Zomi te kha dangtak lua in
Nunna lam pan pial khin ta ung
Na kha Siangtho hong sawl kik in aw Topa

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Hong pi khia in aw Topa hong pi khia in
Na tuu huang nuam sung ah om kim ding in
Mu van lai tha hong guan in
Tai tampi hong ton pih in
Na kha lim nuai hong khawl sak in aw Topa

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Suangpi pan in tui Na phul sak
Israel te Na dawn sak bang
Zomi kha dang tak te hong dawn sak aw
Israel te Na pi khia aa
Cannan gam sung Na lut pih bang
Na Kha Siangtho hong lutpih kik aw Topa

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Van an lm leh vamim sa tawh
Israel te na vak bang in
Zomi te zong nek le dawn hong pia aw
Nang ma sungah nuamsa ding in
Aneu alian hong huai kim in
Itna Pasian Nang bek hong muang ung Topa

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Kei vapai ning mangthang te kiang
Nong gupna thu tang ko ding in
Zogam buppi hong khang lo sak kik aw
Lau lo hang tak Na thu gen ding
Na Kha Siangtho hong guankik aw
Mang thang te kiang gupna thu gen ning Topa
